## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Change Type

- [ ] Docs-only
- [ ] Tests-only
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## Scope

- [ ] CLI behavior
- [ ] MCP tool behavior
- [ ] Storage/envelope/audit schema
- [ ] Release/tag related
- [ ] None of the above

## Tests Run

List tests/checks you ran and their results.

## CLI/MCP Behavior Impact

Describe any user-visible CLI, MCP, or workflow behavior changes.
If none, write "None".

## Storage/Schema/Audit Impact

Describe any storage format, envelope, or audit/schema impact.
If none, write "None".

## Privacy/Security Checklist

Public GitHub pull requests are public. Confirm this PR content does **not** include:

- [ ] API keys
- [ ] Tokens
- [ ] Credentials/passwords/private keys
- [ ] Private prompts
- [ ] Proprietary source code not intended for this repository
- [ ] Customer data
- [ ] Regulated data
- [ ] Logs or command output containing secrets

## Release Notes Needed?

- [ ] No release notes needed
- [ ] Release notes/update needed (describe below)

Release policy reminder:
- Documentation-only changes do not need standalone GitHub releases.
- User-visible CLI/MCP/workflow changes may need a bundled release.
